title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 50.400 - Refusal to settle — commission may estimate amount due
text:
50.400.  Refusal to settle — commission may estimate amount due. — If any person thus chargeable shall neglect or refuse to render true accounts, or settle, as aforesaid, the commission shall adjust the accounts of such delinquent, according to the best information they can obtain, and ascertain the balance due to the county.
(RSMo 1939 § 13816) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12154; 1919 § 9552; 1909 § 3773
